zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ramsden Sr.於1485年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr25歲，母親Alice Bothemly23歲。他於1510年之前與Johanna Beaumont在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1578年10月30日在英國越可爾哈利法可享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ramsden in Cartworth, near Holmfirth (Yorkshire), recorded as Rommesdene in 1315 and Ramesdene in 1323. The placename derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes) or hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + denu ‘valley’.

habitational name from Ramsden in Benenden (Kent). The placename probably derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes), or perhaps an Old English personal name Ramm (genitive Rammes), + Old English denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Ramson
meanings: habitational name, either from Ramshorn in Bickington (Devon) or from Rampisham (Dorset).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ramsden Sr. was born in 1485, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr, was 25 and his mother, Alice Bothemly, was 23. He married Johanna Beaumont before 1510, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 October 1578, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Halifax, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ramsden Sr. est né en 1485, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Bothemly, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Beaumont avant 1510, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1578, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Halifax, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ramsden Sr.が1485年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Ramsden Jrは25歳，母Alice Bothemlyは23歳であった。1510年以前にイギリスでJohanna Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1578年10月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ramsden Sr.(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Bothemly(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1510년 이전 영국에서 Johanna Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 10월 30일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Johanna Beaumont antes 1510, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1578, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Halifax, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ramsden Sr. родился в 1485 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Bothemly, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Beaumont перед 1510 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 октября 1578 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлифакс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
